sys_script_fix.description:
2.7 STRY0112512 - INTERNAL: Fix Script to set all OUs to Permissive/Un-Permissive
This Fix Script will set all OUs to either Permissive or all to Un-Permissive Set the variable "set_all_permissive" to true to make all OU's permissive Set the variable "set_all_permissive" to fales to make all OU's un-permissive
sys_script_fix.name: Tasker 2.7 - Change OU Permissive
